name: ProxyRoute
description: A routing rule on an API reverse proxy or edge proxy that matches incoming HTTP requests and forwards them to a named upstream cluster.

name.description: Unique name of the proxy route.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this route does.
description.example: Routes /v1/payments/* traffic from the public edge to the payments service cluster.

host.description: HTTP Host header value (or virtual host) this route matches.

path_prefix.description: Path prefix the proxy matches against the incoming request URI.

upstream_cluster.description: Name of the upstream cluster traffic is forwarded to.

rewrite_prefix.description: Path prefix to rewrite the matched path to when forwarding upstream.

tls.description: TLS settings applied to this route.

filters.description: Ordered list of proxy filters (rate-limit, auth, WAF, header mutation) applied to this route.

retry_policy.description: Retry policy applied when upstream requests fail.

proxy_type.description: Type of proxy this route is intended for.
